signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Officially Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge Past $1
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Officially Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge Past $1.50** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

The SEC's decision to drop its multi-year lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been confirmed as a key catalyst, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's 10% monthly gain in April 2026, with prices breaking above $1.50 on April 17 before consolidating around $1.42[1][2]
